reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is -1.6% and 20-day momentum is 4.4%.
Trend quality is supported by 50% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 2.8% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 2.1%, downside volatility near 1.3%, and a recent max drawdown of 6.2%.
Volume confirmation is -42.9% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is -2.1% versus SPY over 5 days and -2.2% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is bullish with score 0.65, confidence 0.36, and 0.1 weighted articles across 3 sources.
GPT-5 article classification and company-news provider coverage rated the news flow bullish at 0.78, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 3 articles across 3 sources, 0.1 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.94, average source quality 0.75, confidence 0.66.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC 0.00).
Overall model score is -0.017 with low confidence.

news_evidence.title: Medtronic plc (MDT) Acquires SPR Therapeutics to Enhance Pain Intervention Prospects
news_evidence.llm_reason: Article reports an acquisition (SPR Therapeutics) by Medtronic — a direct corporate action that could alter revenue/profit expectations for pain-intervention/neuromodulation and prompt a short-term market reaction. Source is a financial site (InsiderMonkey) so verification via official press release is recommended, hence slightly reduced confidence.
